content.full_text:
June 14, 1990

John G. McLean, Counsel Enforcement Division
California Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, California 95804-0807

SUBJECT: FPPC Case No. 89/453

In response to your June 12, 1990 telephone request, I have prepared a packet of Exhibits (Exhibit A-Exhibit I) which show the materials prepared and printed by this district for use in educating community voters about the need for school facilities in preparation for the Measure A election on May 9, 1989. I have also attached a copy of the January 31, 1990 letter to Mr. Michael Kenny from Superintendent Jerome R. Thornsley, which enumerates nine specific cost items related to district expenditures; expenditures to inform voters of the purpose and importance of forming the Mello-Roos community facilities district.

I look forward to discussing these items with you and/or Carla Wardlow of your technical assistance division in the near future. As I mentioned by telephone, at the time of our future conversation, I would like to include Jacqueline Cerra, CUSD Community Relations Officer, in the discussion because she was responsible for the wording and preparation of these printed materials.

If you have any questions or comments before we have our telephone talk, please contact me.

Sincerely,

Carole Bailey
Director, Fiscal Services

Enclosures

CB/km
